query:
ALTER TABLE cf_projects 
  ADD COLUMN preDevMonths INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 6 AFTER handoverMonths,
  ADD COLUMN escrowDepositPct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 20.00 AFTER buyerPlanHandoverPct,
  ADD COLUMN contractorAdvancePct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 10.00 AFTER escrowDepositPct,
  ADD COLUMN liquidityBufferPct DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 5.00 AFTER contractorAdvancePct,
  ADD COLUMN constructionCostTotal BIGINT DEFAULT NULL AFTER liquidityBufferPct,
  ADD COLUMN buaSqft INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER constructionCostTotal,
  ADD COLUMN constructionCostPerSqft INT DEFAULT NULL AFTER buaSqft;
